benign_train.description: Path to benign training CSV used to fit quantizer and produce <model_name>_qtz.bin + <model_name>_dp.txt.

benign_val.description: Path to benign validation CSV quantized with the training quantizer (transform-only).

malware_val.description: Path to malware validation CSV quantized with the training quantizer (transform-only).

output_dir.description: Directory where all resulting files are written.

model_name.description: Base model name for generated artifacts.

quantization_tool.description: Path to the quantization executable to invoke.

header.description: CSV header handling mode passed to quantization tool.

problem_type.description: Problem type passed to quantization tool.

remove_outliers.description: Whether to enable outlier clipping in quantization preprocessing.

dev_optimized_config_dir.description: Directory containing optimized JSON config files to copy into output_dir for model components: feature_list, scaler, feature_transform, model_config
